description: 20-change benchmark: same prompts applied to vanilla and HyperFlux versions

changes.prompt: Change all 'Submit' button labels to 'Save'.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/copy.json — change copy.dashboard.submit_button and copy.settings.save_button values from 'Submit' to 'Save'
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserDetail.tsx and SettingsForm.tsx — find and replace the SAVE_BUTTON_LABEL constant and JSX string literals
changes.notes: HyperFlux: 1 file, 2 value changes. Vanilla: 2+ files, code changes.

changes.prompt: Add a 'deactivated' status filter to the user list.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — update config.users.statuses to include 'deactivated', or add the new status to the STATUS_FILTERS array via a rule
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserList.tsx — add 'deactivated' to the STATUS_FILTERS array
changes.notes: Both touch a list, but HyperFlux isolates the change to JSON.

changes.prompt: Hide the alerts widget when alert count is less than 3.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 3, change config.dashboard.alert_min_count if needed
changes.vanilla_target: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — change the threshold constant ALERTS_DISPLAY_THRESHOLD
changes.notes: Threshold is already 3 in both. Benchmark tests ability to locate the value.

changes.prompt: Add a 5% discount for VIP customers.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/pricing.json — change pricing.vip.discount_rate from 0.05 to 0.05 (already set); demonstrate by changing to 0.10 for a second pass
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/PricingTable.tsx — change VIP_DISCOUNT_RATE constant
changes.notes: Core pricing rule change.

changes.prompt: Change the default timezone in settings to show the browser-detected timezone.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — update config.app.default_timezone to use browser detection logic or a new value
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/SettingsForm.tsx — update the timezone default value
changes.notes: Config value change.

changes.prompt: Add email format validation to the user profile form — show an error if the email doesn't contain '@'.
changes.hyperflux_target: Add a rule config.users.email_validation_pattern and update UserDetail.tsx to check it
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserDetail.tsx — add inline validation logic
changes.notes: Validation logic. HyperFlux externalizes the pattern; both touch source for display.

changes.prompt: Show a confirmation dialog before deactivating a user.
changes.hyperflux_target: Add copy.users.deactivate_confirm_message rule and use it in UserDetail.tsx
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserDetail.tsx — add a confirm() call with hardcoded message
changes.notes: UX change. HyperFlux keeps confirmation copy in rules.

changes.prompt: Hide the pricing rules page from non-admin users.
changes.hyperflux_target: Add config.pricing.admin_only rule (boolean true) and check it in pricing/page.tsx
changes.vanilla_target: src/app/pricing/page.tsx — add inline role check for admin
changes.notes: Access control via config rule vs hardcoded.

changes.prompt: Sort the user list by last-active by default.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 'last_active'. Verify config.users.default_sort is used.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserList.tsx — change DEFAULT_SORT constant to 'last_active'
changes.notes: Sort default. Demonstrates value already set correctly in HyperFlux rules.

changes.prompt: Add a 'High Value' badge for users with total revenue over $10,000.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already set at 10000. Verify config.users.high_value_threshold is used.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserList.tsx — verify HIGH_VALUE_THRESHOLD = 10000 and badge is shown
changes.notes: Badge threshold. Tests both reading of config rule and display.

changes.prompt: Refresh the alerts widget every 30 seconds automatically.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 30000ms. Add useEffect in AlertsWidget.tsx using the rule value.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/AlertsWidget.tsx — add useEffect with hardcoded 30000ms interval
changes.notes: Auto-refresh. HyperFlux reads interval from rule; vanilla hardcodes.

changes.prompt: Add a tooltip on the pricing page explaining how discounts are stacked.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/copy.json — add copy.pricing.discount_stack_tooltip rule with the explanation text
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/PricingTable.tsx — add tooltip with hardcoded explanation string
changes.notes: New copy content. HyperFlux: add to rules/copy.json. Vanilla: add inline string.

changes.prompt: Change the date format everywhere from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Verify config.app.date_format is used in utils.ts.
changes.vanilla_target: src/lib/utils.ts — update the date formatting function
changes.notes: Date format. HyperFlux already has it right; both may need utils update.

changes.prompt: Add a maintenance mode banner at the top of every page when maintenance mode is enabled.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — set config.app.maintenance_mode to true; add banner in layout.tsx reading the rule
changes.vanilla_target: src/app/layout.tsx — add banner with hardcoded maintenance mode flag
changes.notes: Layout-level config. HyperFlux: flip one boolean in rules. Vanilla: modify layout.

changes.prompt: Show a warning next to users who haven't logged in for over 90 days.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 90. Verify config.users.inactive_days_warning is used in UserList.tsx.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserList.tsx — verify INACTIVE_WARNING_DAYS = 90 and warning is shown
changes.notes: Threshold check. Both should already work; benchmark measures locate-and-verify speed.

changes.prompt: Add a 'Copy ID' button next to every user's ID in the user detail page.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/copy.json — add copy.users.copy_id_button label. Use it in UserDetail.tsx.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserDetail.tsx — add button with hardcoded 'Copy ID' label
changes.notes: New feature. HyperFlux: rule for label + component code. Vanilla: just component code.

changes.prompt: Change the minimum password requirement from 8 characters to 12 characters.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already at 12. Verify config.auth.min_password_length is used.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserDetail.tsx — change MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH from 8 to 12
changes.notes: Security config. Vanilla was initialized to 12 here, but the benchmark prompt assumes 8.

changes.prompt: Add a 'Weekly Summary Email' notification preference toggle to the settings page.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already has config.notifications.weekly_summary_enabled = false. Wire it to SettingsForm.tsx toggle.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/SettingsForm.tsx — add new toggle with hardcoded default false
changes.notes: New settings field. HyperFlux: rule exists, just wire UI. Vanilla: add code + default.

changes.prompt: Show a 'Deleted' tag on any user whose status is 'deactivated' in the user list.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/copy.json — add copy.users.deactivated_tag rule = 'Deleted'. Use in UserList.tsx.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/UserList.tsx — add conditional tag with hardcoded 'Deleted' string
changes.notes: Status label display. HyperFlux: add rule + wire. Vanilla: inline JSX string.

changes.prompt: Add a site-wide toggle in settings to disable all email notifications.
changes.hyperflux_target: rules/config.json — already has config.notifications.email_disabled = false. Wire to SettingsForm.tsx.
changes.vanilla_target: src/components/SettingsForm.tsx — add toggle with hardcoded default false
changes.notes: Global notification toggle. HyperFlux: rule exists, just surface in UI. Vanilla: add from scratch.
